{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20768_1
|class_id=20768
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20768_2
|fame=17
|art=20
|fth=28
|civ=12
|tech=13
|ss1=prop@1065_2<br>prop@1060_2
|ss2=prop@1065_2<br>prop@1060_2
|ss3=prop@1065_2<br>prop@1060_2
|ss4=prop@1065_2<br>prop@1060_2
|ss7=prop@1065_2<br>prop@1060_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
